goal: Fix all missing error handling, refactor direct Supabase calls in LiveTasting.tsx into hooks, remove dead code, and add Vite code splitting.
summary: Phase 1 complete: wrapped all mutation handlers in try/catch or onError across 6 files (BatchDetail, Profile, FermentationMonitor, RecipeVault, BrewSetup, Challenges); created useTastingMessages.ts and added useLatestTastingSession/useCreateTastingSession to useTastingNotes.ts, fully refactored LiveTasting.tsx to use hooks instead of inline supabase calls; removed 836-line dead code file database.types.ts; added Vite manualChunks for code splitting into vendor-react, vendor-supabase, vendor-query, vendor-charts; verified zero TypeScript errors and successful production build.
stepSummaries:
1. Wrap all 9 mutation handlers in try/catch or add onError handlers (BatchDetail.tsx x3, Profile.tsx x2, FermentationMonitor.tsx x1, RecipeVault.tsx x1, BrewSetup.tsx x1, Challenges.tsx x1) [verified]
  2. Create useTastingMessages and useTastingNotes hooks, refactor LiveTasting.tsx to use them instead of inline supabase inserts [verified]
  3. Remove unused src/lib/database.types.ts dead code [verified]
  4. Add manual chunks to vite.config.ts for code splitting (vendor/react, supabase, charts) [verified]
  5. Build verification: npm run build must pass [verified]

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 5 ran npm run build as a real smoke test (not proxy). Steps 1-4 were verified with grep/file checks (proxies) but Step 5's build actually compiled all changes. The combined verification chain includes at least one real execution.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Build output: '✓ built in 11.02s' with 6 chunks. No circular chunk warnings. tsc --noEmit: zero errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was 'Fix Code Issues & Conventions'. All 5 steps delivered: error handling on mutations, LiveTasting refactored to hooks, dead code removed, code splitting configured, build passes.
